== Big Guy Park ♂ ==
The last apprentice of Monk John. He can wield an iron ball that weighs a ton.

=== Begin Friendship ===
To obtain Big Guy Park, Intercept [[Hitmen|Hitman No.4]].

===☆☆☆ > ★☆☆===
After 3 letters back and forth, Big Guy Park will arrive at [[Home Base]] and gift {{RewardIconWithLink|Incense|orange}} +1.

=== ★☆☆ > ★★☆ ===
After 11 letters back and forth, Big Guy Park will arrive at [[Home Base]] and give {{RewardIconWithLink|Hitman No.6 License|green}}.

=== ★★☆ > ★★★ ===
After 13 letters back and forth, Big Guy Park will move in permanently with his minion, Ironball Thrower.

== Big Gal Park ♀ ==
The last apprentice of Monk John. She can wield an iron ball that weighs a ton.

To obtain Big Gal Park, use [[Altar|Dragon Wish]] "I want girl power!."

== Rent ==
[[File:Big Guy Park rent.png|frameless|200x200px|left]]
Big Guy Park rent is collected on '''Wednesday''' and as a duffel bag on the right-hand side of the room.

 '''Normal Rent''': {{RewardIconWonderFungusWithText|Green|NoStat|green}}; {{RewardIconWonderFungusWithText|Blue|NoStat|blue}}

 '''Big Gal Park Rare Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Big Guy Park's Chest Hair|blue}}; {{RewardIconWithLink|Toner, +300}}

{{Clear}}

== Relics ==
Upgrading these will earn wood and stone!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"  
!Relic Tier
!Reward
|-
|★
|Wood +200, Stone +200
|-
|★★
|Wood +200, Stone +200
|-
|★★★
|Wood +200, Stone +200
|-
|★★★★
|Wood +400, Stone +400
|-
|★★★★★
|Wood +800, Stone +800
|-
|★★★★★★
|Wood +1.6k, Stone +1.6k
|}

{| class="wiki-table" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Moai}}{{Relink|Moai}}
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Costa Rica Stone}}{{Relink|Costa Rica Stone}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Prehistoric Fossil}}{{Relink|Prehistoric Fossil}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Sword Throne}}{{Relink|Sword Throne}}
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Houmuwu Ding}}{{Relink|Houmuwu Ding}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Notre Dame Bell}}{{Relink|Notre Dame Bell}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Venus de Milo}}{{Relink|Venus de Milo}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Artificial Blackhole}}{{Relink|Artificial Blackhole}}
|}

== Prison Conditioning ==
No one can move the iron ball without a strong physique. For people who practice Martial Arts, good health is the basis of everything.

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Research Skill<br>Required
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||0||FAME +5||Snail ATK +5
|-
|2||180||2k||FAME +10||Snail ATK +10
|-
|3||190||4.5k||FAME +15||Snail ATK +15
|-
|4||200||8k||FAME +20||Snail ATK +20
|-
|5||210||12.5k||FAME +25||Snail ATK +25
|-
|6||220||18k||FAME +30||Snail ATK +30
|-
|7||230||24.5k||FAME +35||Snail ATK +35
|-
|8||240||32k||FAME +40||Snail ATK +40
|-
|9||250||40.5k||FAME +45||Snail ATK +45
|-
|10||260||50k||FAME +50||Snail ATK +50
|-
|11||270||60.5k||FAME +55||Snail ATK +55
|-
|12||285||72k||FAME +60||Snail ATK +60
|-
|13||300||84.5k||FAME +65||Snail ATK +65
|-
|14||315||98k||FAME +70||Snail ATK +70
|-
|15||330||112k||FAME +75||Snail ATK +75
|-
|16||345||123k||FAME +80||Snail ATK +80
|-
|17||360||144k||FAME +85||Snail ATK +85
|-
|18||375||162k||FAME +90||Snail ATK +90
|-
|19||390||180k||FAME +95||Snail ATK +95
|-
|20||400||200k||FAME +100||Snail ATK +100
|-
|21||420||220k||FAME +105||Snail ATK +105
|-
|22||440||242k||FAME +110||Snail ATK +110
|-
|23||460||264k||FAME +115||Snail ATK +115
|-
|24||480||285k||FAME +120||Snail ATK +120
|-
|25||500||309k||FAME +125||Snail ATK +125
|-
|26||520||333k||FAME +130||Snail ATK +130
|-
|27||540||357k||FAME +135||Snail ATK +135
|-
|28||560||381k||FAME +140||Snail ATK +140
|-
|29||580||405k||FAME +145||Snail ATK +145
|-
|30||600||429k||FAME +150||Snail ATK +150
|}

==Commander==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Prison Conditioning is.

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +10
|-
|2||4k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +20
|-
|3||6k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +30
|-
|4||8k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +40
|-
|5||10k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +50
|-
|6||12k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +60
|-
|7||14k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +70
|-
|8||16k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +80
|-
|9||18k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +90
|-
|10||20k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +100
|-
|11||22k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +110
|-
|12||24k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +120
|-
|13||26k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +130
|-
|14||28k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +140
|-
|15||30k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +150
|-
|16||32k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +160
|-
|17||34k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +170
|-
|18||36k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +180
|-
|19||38k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +190
|-
|20||40k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +200
|-
|21||42k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +210
|-
|22||44k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +220
|-
|23||46k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +230
|-
|24||48k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +240
|-
|25||50k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +250
|-
|26||55k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +260
|-
|27||60k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +270
|-
|28||65k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +280
|-
|29||70k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +290
|-
|30||75k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +300
|}

== Research Ability ==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Big Guy Park specializes in '''Demon Genes''' and therefore the research manual cost for the Demon Gene is halved. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Manuals Required 
|-
|1-10||1
|-
|11-20||2
|-
|21-30||3
|-
|31-40||4
|-
|61-70||20
|-
|71-80||40
|-
|81-90||60
|-
|91-95||80
|-
|96||100
|-
|97||200
|-
|98||400
|-
|99||600
|-
|100||800
|}

== Minion - Ironball Thrower ==
Founded by Big Guy Park, Ironball Sect enrolls all kinds of prisoners, precisely speaking, all kinds of those turned down by other sects!

=== Special Ability - Shackled ===
Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle, Troop ATK +10 (multiplied by minion level)

=== Minion Relics ===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Ironball Throwers!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!Name
!★☆☆☆☆☆
!★★☆☆☆☆
!★★★☆☆☆
!★★★★☆☆
!★★★★★☆
!★★★★★★
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Moai}}<br>{{relink|Moai}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Costa Rica Stone}}<br>{{relink|Costa Rica Stone}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Prehistoric Fossil}}<br>{{relink|Prehistoric Fossil}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Sword Throne}}<br>{{relink|Sword Throne}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Houmuwu Ding}}<br>{{relink|Houmuwu Ding}}
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Notre Dame Bell}}<br>{{relink|Notre Dame Bell}}
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Venus de Milo}}<br>{{relink|Venus de Milo}}
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Artificial Blackhole}}<br>{{relink|Artificial Blackhole}}
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Minion ATK Boost]]
